'''nganadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jhow|jhow]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-n-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jhow|jhow]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nganadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngænædhæth|ngænædhæth]] || [[word:ngænædhæj|ngænædhæj]] || [[word:ngænædhæsh|ngænædhæsh]] || [[word:ngænædhæ|ngænædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngananadhath|ngananadhath]] || [[word:ngananadhaj|ngananadhaj]] || [[word:ngananadhash|ngananadhash]] || [[word:ngananadha|ngananadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nganadhath|nganadhath]] || [[word:nganadhaj|nganadhaj]] || [[word:nganadhash|nganadhash]] || [[word:nganadha|nganadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nganafdhath|nganafdhath]] || [[word:nganafdhaj|nganafdhaj]] || [[word:nganafdhash|nganafdhash]] || [[word:nganafdhaf|nganafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nganadhatha|nganadhatha]] || [[word:nganadhaja|nganadhaja]] || [[word:nganadhasha|nganadhasha]] || [[word:nganadhaka|nganadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nganadhath|nganadhath]] || [[word:nganadhaj|nganadhaj]] || [[word:nganadhash|nganadhash]] || [[word:nganadha|nganadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nganadhathal|nganadhathal]] || [[word:nganadhajal|nganadhajal]] || [[word:nganadhashal|nganadhashal]] || [[word:nganadhakal|nganadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nganadhathatha|nganadhathatha]] || [[word:nganadhajaja|nganadhajaja]] || [[word:nganadhashasha|nganadhashasha]] || [[word:nganadhaka|nganadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nganadhathan|nganadhathan]] || [[word:nganadhajan|nganadhajan]] || [[word:nganadhashan|nganadhashan]] || [[word:nganadhakan|nganadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nganadhathaoro|nganadhathaoro]] || [[word:nganadhajaoro|nganadhajaoro]] || [[word:nganadhashaoro|nganadhashaoro]] || [[word:nganadhakaoro|nganadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
